name: MSI Credit Solutions
description_short: MSI Credit Solutions is a Dallas-based credit repair firm. BBB A+ accredited. 2,283 Google reviews. Offers consumer and business credit repair services.
description_long:
MSI Credit Solutions is a BBB A+-accredited credit repair firm based in Dallas, Texas, founded around 2012. The company offers both consumer credit repair and business credit services, distinguishing it from firms that focus exclusively on personal credit. With approximately 2,283 Google reviews, MSI has built a notable local reputation. The BBB A+ accreditation is a meaningful trust signal — only a minority of credit repair firms achieve and maintain this level.

Services include credit report analysis, dispute filing with all three bureaus, debt validation, credit-building guidance, and business credit development. The company serves clients nationwide despite its Texas base.

As with all credit repair firms, no company can guarantee removal of accurate negative information. The BBB A+ accreditation suggests the company resolves complaints effectively and operates transparently.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally strong reputation: 4.8-star average across 2,283 reviews is rare in the credit repair industry
Dallas-based with local accountability, making in-person consultations more accessible for Texas residents
Operates as a credit counseling service, suggesting a broader educational approach beyond just filing disputes
Large review volume reduces the risk of a manipulated or unrepresentative rating
Reported focus on all three major credit bureaus, addressing the full scope of a client's credit profile
Established presence in a market where many competitors are short-lived or operate without local roots
cons: No pricing information readily available publicly, making it difficult to comparison-shop before an initial consultation
As with any credit repair firm, results depend heavily on what's in your credit file — clients with accurate negative items may see limited improvement
Dallas-area focus may mean less personalized support for out-of-state clients despite apparent remote service availability
Credit counseling and credit repair are distinct services; it is worth clarifying upfront which approach applies to your situation and what is included
High review counts can occasionally reflect volume-driven referral incentives — reading the substance of individual reviews is worthwhile
best_for: Texas consumers seeking BBB A+-accredited credit repair services
Individuals with credit report errors needing professional dispute assistance
Business owners who also need personal credit repair
diagnosis: MSI Credit Solutions stands out with BBB A+ accreditation — a genuine differentiator in the credit repair space where most firms are not accredited. The dual consumer/business credit offering adds value for entrepreneurs. Compare pricing against The Credit People ($79/mo) and Lexington Law.
services: Credit report review and analysis across all three major bureaus
Dispute filing for inaccurate or unverifiable negative items
Credit score monitoring and progress tracking
Identity theft and fraud item dispute support
Consultation on credit utilization and account management
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: MSI Credit Solutions is a Dallas-based credit repair firm. BBB A+ accredited. 2,283 Google reviews. Offers consumer and business credit repair services.
